content:
500+ Strong. One Mission. Countless Possibilities.

Thank you for being a part of the Crime Bias journey. Your trust inspires us to continue promoting legal awareness, justice, and truth.

This is just the beginning.

Educate. Empower. Defend.

Crime Bias. 
Shubham Chakraborty 
NAKSHIKA TRIVEDI

comment: Building legal awareness at scale also means making complex legal processes easier to understand, so people can distinguish verified facts from assumptions before forming opinions or taking action.
